faqs.answer: Main Priya, Rajesh Motors se. Aapki complaint register kar rahi hun.
Normal complaint mein 2-4 ghante mein engineer call karega. Breakdown urgent hai toh 4-6 ghante mein pahunch jayega.
Service visit 500-1000 rupees. Oil change 2000-3000. Exact cost engineer dekhega machine check karke.
Warranty machine ke liye service free hai. Engineer warranty card check karega aur confirm karega.
Monday-Saturday 9 AM - 6 PM. Sunday band hai lekin breakdown ke liye 24/7 emergency service hai.
Cash, card, UPI sab payment methods available hain. Engineer ke paas card machine bhi hoti hai.
Rajesh Motors - JCB service center. Hum Rajasthan mein service provide karte hain.
Aap engineer ko directly call kar sakte hain ya complaint register karke engineer aapko call karega. Aur details ke liye Rajesh Motors office se contact karein.
Hum oil change, filter change, service, breakdown repair, hydraulic repair, electrical repair sab karte hain.
Breakdown urgent hai. Immediately complaint register karein. Engineer 4-6 ghante mein pahunch jayega. Machine ko safe place par rakhein.
Complaint register karne ke liye machine number, problem description, aur aapka location chahiye. Main sab details le rahi hun.
Machine kahan hai - workshop mein ya field mein? Yeh batayein taaki engineer ko pata chal jaye.
Complaint register hote hi engineer ko message jayega. Woh aapko call karega aur time confirm karega.
Spare parts availability ke liye engineer check karega. Zyada tar parts available hote hain. Exact details engineer batayega.
Service warranty details engineer dekhega. Warranty period machine ke purchase date par depend karta hai.
Complaint status ke liye engineer ko call karein ya Rajesh Motors office se contact karein.
Complaint cancel karni ho toh engineer ko call karein aur batayein.
Ek ek machine ke liye separate complaint register karni padti hai. Sab machine numbers bataiye.
Hum best quality service provide karte hain. Agar koi problem ho toh engineer ko batayein.
Aapka feedback important hai. Agar service mein koi problem ho toh Rajesh Motors office ko inform karein.
